title: Antigravity Plugin Manifest
description: Schema for Antigravity CLI plugin manifest files (plugin.json)

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON schema this manifest validates against.

name.description: The unique, machine-readable name of the plugin. Must contain only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores.

description.description: A brief human-readable description of the plugin's purpose and capabilities.

author.description: The plugin author, as an object.

repository.description: URL to the plugin's source repository.
